name: dev-cache-cleaner
title: Dev Cache Cleaner
description: Scan and clean developer caches, build artifacts, and orphaned dependencies to reclaim disk space
author: Undolog

commands.name: scan-caches
commands.title: Scan Caches
commands.subtitle: Dev Cache Cleaner
commands.description: Scan developer caches and build artifacts, see reclaimable space, and clean selectively

commands.name: clean-safe-caches
commands.title: Clean Safe Caches
commands.subtitle: Dev Cache Cleaner
commands.description: Scan and instantly clean all safe developer caches with one click

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Cache Status
commands.subtitle: Dev Cache Cleaner
commands.description: Show reclaimable cache space in the menu bar

preferences.name: projectPaths
preferences.title: Project Directories
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of directories to scan for orphaned build artifacts (e.g. ~/Projects, ~/GitHub)

preferences.name: minAgeDays
preferences.title: Minimum Age (days)
preferences.description: Only flag build artifacts older than this many days

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
